description: A plant manager wants to review the consumption of key utilities (steam, nitrogen, electricity) for the past month to track efficiency.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the utility consumption data for the past month from the plant historian.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls the requested data.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report showing the total consumption for each utility and compare it to the previous month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a report showing steam usage increased by 5%.

nodes.task_description: Correlate the increased steam usage with the production schedule to see if it was due to a specific energy-intensive product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the increase was expected as more of Product X was made.
